nasb.text: and Oholibamah bore Jeush and Jalam and Korah. These are the sons of Esau who were born to him in the land of Canaan.

esv.text: and Oholibamah bore Jeush, Jalam, and Korah. These are the sons of Esau who were born to him in the land of Canaan.

cnv.text: 阿何利巴瑪生了耶烏施、雅蘭和可拉。這些都是以掃的兒子，是在迦南地生的。

ccb.text: 阿何利巴玛生了耶乌施、雅兰和可拉。他们都是以扫的儿子，是在迦南出生的。

csbs.text: 阿何利巴玛生了耶乌施、雅兰、可拉。以上是以扫的众子，是他在迦南地生的。
